feed.title: André Barbato
feed.subtitle: A blog and portfolio for Data Science and Analytics projects.

entry.title: First Post
entry.summary: First Post ================ GitHub Documents This is an R Markdown format used for publishing markdown documents to GitHub. When you click the Knit button all R code chunks are run and a markdown file (.md) suitable for publishing to GitHub is generated. Including Code You can include R code in the document as follows: summary(cars) ## speed dist ## Min. : 4.0 ...
